# kLSMMapDiscardCounts

**Global Variable**

An option that specifies not to keep counts.

## Declaration

```swift
var kLSMMapDiscardCounts: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

If you specify this option when loading the map, you must reload the map without this option before calling [doc://com.apple.latentsemanticmapping/documentation/LatentSemanticMapping/LSMMapStartTraining(_:)].

If you specify this option when storing the map, the stored map can’t be retrained at all. This option can save a lot of memory or disk space.

## Constants

- **kLSMMapLoadMutable**: An option that specifies to load the map as mutable in training state.
- **kLSMMapHashText**: An option that specifies to transform the text so it’s not human-readable.
